All along the bushy strips edging empty lot. The plums grow in clusters, appear small. Crabapples are about quarter sized. Coralberry growing under trees. Old apple tree next to building.

Sweet red apple shorter tree, maybe 10' tall. Heavily fruiting as of 2015. Right next to car wash entrance. Could really use a pruning. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Knotweed and Garlic mustard along edge/ in understory. Couple of black cherry trees.
Several mulberry trees, mostly south of patch, blackberry is mostly to north of patch with grape between-ish. Ground Ivy is in mowed area in front of bushy patch. Falling Fruit season: June-August.
